intro: Stelis infundibulosa is a species of flowering plant in the orchid family, native to tropical regions of Central and South America. This plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine to treat various health conditions, including inflammation, wounds, and respiratory issues, due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties.
